lang.label: Language
dashboard.subtitle: Your created position data will appear here. Use New to open the editor; cloud-saved projects are listed below.
auth.loginTagline: Log in to access your saved formations anytime.
auth.loginFooterHint: New here? Create a free account.
auth.registerBlurb: Create an account with email and password to save projects in the cloud.
library.pageSubtitle: Choose a new or saved project before opening the editor.
library.browserDataDesc: Legacy position data found in this browser. Opening will import it to a new editor session.
library.needLoginForCloud: Log in to list and open cloud projects.
library.emptyCloud: No cloud projects yet. Use "Start New Project" above.
dashboard.demoSessionBanner: Demo session: Cloud list not available until login/API is connected. Use Logout to return to login screen.
editor.cloudSaveBodyNew: Your current edits will be uploaded. The first save adds a project ID to the URL; your work continues seamlessly. Choose "Don't Save" to close without sending anything.
editor.cloudSaveBodyOverwrite: Overwrite this cloud project with your current edits? Choose "Don't Save" to close without sending.
